CustomField.formula:
IF( isClosed__c, IF( OR( TEXT(Delivery_Plant__c)='3011', TEXT(Delivery_Plant__c)='3020' ),
Delivery_Total_Cost__c,
Delivery_Quantity__c*Product_Cost__c ), IF( OR( TEXT(Delivery_Plant__c)='3011', TEXT(Delivery_Plant__c)='3020' ), IF( Delivery_Quantity__c = 0, Quantity__c*Product_Cost__c, (Quantity__c-Delivery_Quantity__c)*Delivery_Unit_Cost__c+Delivery_Total_Cost__c ), Quantity__c*Product_Cost__c )
)
CustomField.label: Actual Total Cost
